nodes.label: batch-1-input.json
nodes.description: Intermediate metadata file for understand-anything pipeline batch 1. Catalogs 7 GitHub Actions workflow YAML files (.github/workflows/) with their sizes and categories. ImportData section lists all batch files in this pipeline with empty import arrays. Part of a multi-batch processing pipeline that splits the project into chunks for incremental analysis.

nodes.label: batch-2-input.json
nodes.description: Intermediate metadata file for understand-anything pipeline batch 2. Catalogs 6 files from the .agentic/ directory: HANDOFF.md, HANDOFF_REF-006.md, IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md, README.md, config.json, policies.json. ImportData shows cross-references between batch files with empty import arrays.

nodes.label: batch-3-input.json
nodes.description: Intermediate metadata file for understand-anything pipeline batch 3. Catalogs 5 markdown prompt files from .agentic/prompts/: analyze.md, implement.md, plan.md, pr-body.md, review.md. These are AI agent prompt templates used by the agentic workflow system.

nodes.label: batch-4-input.json
nodes.description: Intermediate metadata file for understand-anything pipeline batch 4. Catalogs 3 Claude Code rule files from .claude/rules/: architecture.md, message-handling.md, topic-architecture.md. These define coding conventions and architectural guidelines for Claude Code sessions.

nodes.label: batch-5-input.json
nodes.description: Intermediate metadata file for understand-anything pipeline batch 5. Catalogs 8 root-level project files: .env.example, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, README_CN.md, README_RU.md, pyproject.toml, test.txt. These are top-level documentation and configuration files.

nodes.label: changed-files.txt
nodes.description: Flat space-separated list of changed/modified file paths across the entire project. Contains over 200 paths covering .agentic/, .github/workflows/, .grok/, .understand-anything/, src/, tests/, and root-level files. Used by the understand-anything pipeline to track which files have been modified and need re-analysis.

nodes.label: import-map-input.json
nodes.description: Complete project-wide import map used by the understand-anything pipeline. Lists all 67 project files with their fileCategory (code, config, docs) and language (python, markdown, json, yaml, toml, txt, otf). Includes all source files under src/ccbot/ (core bot, handlers, utilities), tests/, config files, and documentation. Serves as the master file registry for the analysis pipeline.
